Records.description: Two-loop planar double-box integral family for NNLO QCD corrections to ttbar hadroproduction (paper label: tt). Seven inverse propagators (one massive internal line D5) and two ISPs (D8, D9). External momenta: p1, p2 massless; p3, p4 massive (p3^2=p4^2=m^2). Four top-sector integrals computed numerically from eps^-4 to eps^0 with 20-digit precision at s=30, t=-10/3, m^2=1, using both automatic (SolveIntegrals) and manual (BlackBoxAMFlow+FitEps) workflows. IBP reduction via FiniteFlow+LiteRed, FIRE+LiteRed, or Kira.
Records.location: Section 3, Fig. 4 (fig:tt), Eqs. (3.1)-(3.2); example in examples/automatic_vs_manual/run.wl
